Starting with a near-term anchor of 0.46 for the one-week forecast to honor the slight negative seasonal bias, I am regressing the probabilities smoothly back toward 0.50 for the longer forecast horizons (which span 1 to 6 months), adhering to the instruction that distance increases uncertainty and should pull predictions closer to 50/50.
